tools.name: get_stock_data
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive stock market data for individual ticker symbols from Yahoo Finance. Returns current price, intraday high/low, 52-week range, trading volume, market capitalization, P/E ratio, earnings per share, dividend yield, and sector classification. Use for fundamental analysis, stock scr

tools.name: screen_stocks
tools.description: Filter and screen stocks based on financial criteria like market cap range, sector, P/E ratio thresholds, dividend yield, or revenue growth. Returns matching ticker symbols with key metrics. Use for value investing, growth stock identification, or portfolio rebalancing analysis.

tools.name: get_crypto_prices
tools.description: Fetch real-time cryptocurrency prices and 24-hour market data for multiple coins. Returns current price in USD, 24h price change percentage, market cap, and trading volume. Use for crypto portfolio tracking, price alerts, or comparing digital assets.

tools.name: get_exchange_rates
tools.description: Look up current foreign exchange rates between major world currencies. Returns exchange rate, bid/ask spread, and last update timestamp. Use for travel planning, international business transactions, or forex trading decisions.

tools.name: track_crypto_portfolio
tools.description: Monitor real-time prices and performance metrics for a portfolio of cryptocurrency holdings. Returns current price per coin, 24-hour percentage change, portfolio value summary, and top movers. Use for active portfolio management and price monitoring.
